## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX Labs' AI-driven content optimization and SEO services for Pinecone's organic growth strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offers an AI+expert approach to content creation and SEO, focusing on editorial, content, and organic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Their service includes strategy development, content creation/refresh, and technical SEO audits, with pricing at 10-20 cents per word](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Pinecone aims to improve content attribution, solidify keyword rankings, and effectively target emerging AI-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs has a 90-day pilot period before a full year engagement, with the next available start date on April 7th](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)

## Topics

### Pinecone's Current Content Strategy and Challenges

  - [Strong organic presence, ranking highly for important keywords](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Seeking to understand content impact on funnel progression](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Aiming to solidify and improve existing keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Desire to effectively target new keywords in the dynamic AI market](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Current keyword ownership "drops off a cliff" after the top 4 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Approach and Methodology

  - [AI workflows as code framework with human oversight at every step](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Comprehensive onboarding process: deep company research, content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Focus on both refreshing existing content and creating new content](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Utilizes AI for research, aggregating hundreds of sources beyond top 10 search results](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Human editors and fact-checkers ensure quality and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [Emphasis on long-tail keywords and content volume to capture market share](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Service Offerings

  - [Build a custom Content OS (currently using Airtable) to track progress and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Conduct technical SEO audits, including on-page and off-page factors](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Provide weekly check-ins and collaboration with the client team](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Flexible integration with existing content teams and subject matter experts](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Transparent pricing model: 10-20 cents per word for published and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Track Record and Team

  - [Worked with AI companies like Galileo AI and others in the LLM security space](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Recently closed Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Hiring experienced SEO professionals (e.g., former heads of SEO from G2.com and TripAdvisor)](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX Labs to send an SLW proposal with detailed engagement terms](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Add Patrick to a Slack channel for direct communication and questions](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [Patrick to discuss the proposal with Mike (former IBMer) and the Pinecone content team](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [Tentatively pencil in April 7th as a potential start date](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for early next week](https://fathom.video/share/JX9cyxgMRgALTyjgKwnR-yx-BwP7zFCh?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
